review: This board book is absolutely adorable. I got it as a birthday gift for my 3-year-old niece and she loves it! The illustrations are so charming and the colors are warm and beautiful. The board pages are very sturdy and thick. My sister said Lily has been asking for it every night at bedtime. 100% recommend for toddler gifts.

The speckled white ceramic planter is even more beautiful in person. The speckle detail in the glaze catches the light so nicely. It's the perfect size for my little succulent on my windowsill at home. Packed really well - arrived with zero damage. Will definitely be ordering more of these!

This market bag is my new favorite thing. The weave is so tight and sturdy - I've already taken it to the Westerville farmers market twice and loaded it up with produce and it holds everything perfectly. The natural and rust color combo is gorgeous and goes with everything. Fast shipping too. Already thinking about ordering another color!

I ordered the personalized Christmas ornament with my niece's name 'Lily' for her very first Christmas ornament. It is SO sweet. The hand-lettering is neat and the little floral motif around her name is darling. Came in a little box so it was already gift-ready. My sister cried happy tears when Lily opened it. Cannot say enough good things!

Love the indigo market bag! The color is rich and deep, not at all faded-looking. Took it to Trader Joe's and fit a whole week of groceries with no problem. The weave is even and tight. I've been looking for a sturdy handwoven bag that doesn't look floppy and this is exactly it. Great value.

The sage green planter is perfect for my little pothos cutting. The matte glaze feels so nice in your hands and the sage color works with my whole apartment's decor. Really happy with the quality - it's heavier than I expected which makes it feel substantial. Shipping was quick and well-packed.

The indigo market bag I bought for Rachel's birthday gift was a hit - she loved it! Shipping was fast and arrived in great shape. The only minor thing is the handles were slightly uneven in length (one was about half an inch shorter than the other) but it's barely noticeable when carrying. Overall really lovely quality and I'd buy again.

Counting Columbus is the most charming thing! I grew up in Cleveland and moved to Columbus and this book gave me all the feels. Bought it for my mom as a fun reminder of where I live now and she loved reading it to Lily on FaceTime. The illustrations are detailed and warm. Such a unique and thoughtful gift.

Big Feelings Little Bear was a perfect birthday gift for my 3-year-old niece. She has been very emotional lately (typical toddler!) and her parents said this book has really helped give her language for her feelings. The illustrations are so gentle and warm. Already planning to buy more books from this shop for Lily's upcoming birthday in December.

Second time ordering these planters! I originally got one for myself and now I ordered a set of three as a housewarming gift for a friend. They look so beautiful grouped together. The seller was kind enough to wrap them individually. Really consistent quality across both orders.

The Westerville print is well done. Downloaded instantly, printed at Staples on cardstock, and it holds up at size. Good local subject matter. Would gift these to people who've moved to or from the area.

A Bunny Named Lou is the sweetest baby book I've ever seen. The high-contrast illustrations are perfect for babies - my sister sent me a video of Lily (almost 4 now but got this when she was younger) still reading it and naming all the colors. These books get so much use. This shop is my go-to for all baby and toddler gifts now.

Bought this terracotta pot set as a treat for myself after a stressful work week and it was exactly the kind of small joy I needed. The two sizes are perfect for propagating my plant cuttings. The drainage hole is well-drilled and the clay feels solid. Really happy with the purchase - this shop ships very carefully.

The Columbus skyline print is beautiful! I have it in a simple black frame on my bedroom wall and it looks so clean and modern. The lines are crisp and the color palette is just earthy enough to feel warm without being kitschy. Downloaded immediately. My coworker asked where I got it - definitely recommending this shop.

Got the personalized name banner for my niece Lily's birthday party and it was a huge hit. The letter cutouts are thick cardstock and held up through a whole party afternoon. The blush and gold color scheme looked so pretty against the party backdrop. My sister is already asking me to order one for Christmas! Fast shipping, well wrapped.

Really pretty woven wall hanging - I hung it in my entryway and it fills the space perfectly. The fringe is even and the weaving is really clean. My only note is the color in the photo reads a little more sage green than it is in person - it's slightly more olive. That said, I still like it a lot and the quality is great for the price.

Ordered the hand-poured soy candle in the 'Sunday Morning' scent and my apartment smells incredible. The throw is strong without being overwhelming - perfect for a small living room. The jar is simple and reusable. This is my third candle from this shop and they never disappoint. Great Etsy find.

The 'Good Morning' tea towel is so cheerful - perfect for my kitchen. The print is clear and the linen is really soft and absorbent. It's the kind of small detail that makes your space feel more intentional. I've been buying kitchen textiles from Etsy instead of big-box stores and this is one of the best finds. Great quality for the price.

Bought the 'Lily' personalized storybook for my niece's third birthday. The seller lets you add the child's name throughout the story and even insert a little note from the giver. Lily was absolutely delighted seeing her name on every page. The paper quality is good and it arrived within a week of ordering. This is such a special gift idea.

Picked up the linen throw pillow cover in the cream and natural stripe for my couch. It's a really nice neutral that works with my whole color scheme and the texture is lovely. Easy to slip on and off for washing. Arrived folded neatly in tissue paper which was a sweet touch. Another solid buy from this shop - I keep coming back.
